name: Reputation Heatmap
description: Separate healthy mystique from rumor, overreach, parasocial risk, or brand harm, then produce a calm response playbook with thresholds and no-response rules.
short_description: Map mystique, rumor, and brand risk into a response playbook.
audience: PR leads and talent teams reviewing public narrative shifts
Founder-led brands separating confirmed concerns from speculation
Community operators defining escalation thresholds and no-response rules
detail_lines: Labels signals by severity, confidence, amplification risk, and response mode before recommending action.
Makes do-not-amplify and privacy boundaries explicit so risk review does not accidentally launder rumors.
Works from public or user-authorized material and flags legal, PR, or leadership review needs instead of automating retaliation.
